required_preferences.fact: Attends gentle yoga or physiotherapy-guided exercise classes twice a week in Berlin, avoiding swimming and strenuous gym workouts as per medical advice

supersedes.fact: Swims at least twice a week when in Berlin, choosing swimming over gym workouts whenever possible

required_preferences.fact: Strictly researches and avoids any dishes or packaged foods containing the allergenic additive when traveling or at home, declining local delicacies with the ingredient even if customary; continues plant-based focus in Berlin, still avoids dairy and red meat

supersedes.fact: Adopts local cuisine when traveling, but never eats dairy or red meat when at home in Berlin

required_preferences.fact: Uses recovery period to listen to photography and cinematography podcasts for creative inspiration, never skips the daily learning session while unable to shoot or edit
Begins documenting her recovery and local Berlin experiences through Instagram stories, shifting her content from travel focus to personal wellness and urban life updates
Uses her recovery period to connect with Berlin-based creative peers through coffee meetups and casual portfolio reviews, prioritizing in-person networking over remote collaborations
Collects vintage postcards from each assignment location, refusing digital souvenirs

persona: A solo freelance photographer who travels internationally for assignments
